:main-opts ["-m" "nrepl.cmdline"]}, :migrate {:extra-deps {migratus/migratus {:mvn/version "1.5.9"}}, :main-opts ["-m" "migratus.core" "migrate"]}, :build {:deps {io.github.clojure/tools.build {:mvn/version "0.9.6"}}, :ns-default build}}, :deps {org.clojure/clojure {:mvn/version "1.12.3"}}}}
